explanation: The user wants to remove objects from the sink. From the state, the discussed objects include mug_0 (dirty and on top of the sink), spraybottle_0, and peppershaker_0, which are inside the sinkbasin_0. Since the robot can only hold one object at a time, it must pick up each object one by one and place it on a receptacle (countertop_0 is chosen as a suitable surface). The plan ensures all objects are removed from the sink and placed safely on the countertop. No slicing or other operations are needed as the task is purely about retrieval and placement.
